title: firmiana simplex
intro: Firmiana simplex, also known as the strychnine tree or Chinese strychnine, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. Traditionally, Firmiana simplex has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Firmiana simplex is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically consumed under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
